packet_markdown:
# 7950 West Sunset building packet

## Snapshot
- Building ID: 7950-west-sunset-7950-w-sunset-blvd
- Address: 7950 W Sunset Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90046
- Primary URL: https://7950westsunset.com/
- Management company: Legacy Partners
- Recommended status: research_complete
- Last updated: 2026-03-22

## Scorecard
- Quiet: 3 (low, evidence count 1)
- Management: 3 (low, evidence count 2)
- Amenity: 5 (high, evidence count 3)
- Community stability: 3 (low, evidence count 1)
- Location fit: 4
- Pricing transparency: 3

## Risks
- Structural noise risk: unknown
- Location noise risk: high
- Security risk: low
- Pricing risk: medium

## Evidence summary
- [official] The official site still markets a high-amenity community with strong lifestyle positioning on Sunset. Source: 7950 West Sunset official site (https://7950westsunset.com/). Note: Official copy describes luxury apartments with top-tier amenities on Sunset Boulevard.
- [review] Current third-party listings continue to show active inventory, in-unit laundry, and published rents. Source: Apartments.com (https://www.apartments.com/7950-west-sunset-los-angeles-ca/8h53150/). Note: Apartments.com showed current availability and pricing from March 2026.
- [news] Architecture and development references tied the project to Legacy Partners. Source: TCA Architects project page (https://tca-arch.com/work/790-west-sunset/). Note: The TCA project page identifies Legacy Partners as the client for 7950 West Sunset.

## Open questions
- Verify management company, exact fee stack, and whether any available units are exposed to Sunset noise.

## Notes
Research complete but not promoted yet. Amenity fit is strong and management can now be tied to Legacy Partners, but the building is still directly on Sunset and public resident experience remains thin in the visible web evidence.
